description_long: This doll features a stylized, cartoonish female figure with a large head, pale skin, and exaggerated facial features including large green eyes, long lashes, and red lips. She is dressed in a bright red strapless mini dress and matching red high-heeled shoes, with gold hoop earrings and bracelets accenting her look. The doll's black hair is short, curly, and voluminous, with distinct sculpted spikes. Her pose is demure, with knees together, arms bent and hands resting in front, and her head slightly tilted to one side. The surface appears smooth and matte, with painted details for the facial features and clothing. This object is likely made of molded plastic, typical for collectible or decorative dolls.
description: A stylized female doll with a large head, short curly black hair, red dress, and high heels, featuring exaggerated facial features and gold accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, red dress, and hands clasped in front, with full visibility of facial features and accessories.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the doll's profile, the curve of the dress, and the side of the face and hair.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, hair, and dress, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, the shape of the dress, and the side of the face and hair.
attribute_clothing_style: Strapless red mini dress with a sweetheart neckline, paired with matching red high-heeled shoes; the style is reminiscent of 1930s pin-up fashion with bold, simple color blocking and no visible patterns.
attribute_pose: Standing with knees together, torso upright, arms bent and hands resting in front of the thighs, head slightly tilted to one side, and feet close together in a demure, static pose.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with wide, open green eyes, arched eyebrows, and a small, closed mouth with red lips, conveying a cheerful and playful demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short, curly black hair styled in voluminous, sculpted spikes characteristic of classic cartoon characters.
